title: lotononis mollis
intro: Lotononis mollis, also known as the 'white wormwood', is a plant species native to southern Africa. It possesses medicinal properties due to its high content of alkaloids, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Lotononis mollis include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas and infusions, as well as being incorporated into traditional medicine, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential applications.
